---
name: pptx
description: "Create and refine presentation decks. Use when user asks for slide outlines, pitch decks, technical summaries, or converting notes into structured slides."
---

# PPTX

## When to use
- Build new decks from requirements.
- Improve existing slide flow and messaging.
- Produce concise visual narratives for demos/reviews.

## Procedure
1. Define audience, objective, and key message sequence.
2. Build slide structure with clear progression.
3. Keep slide text concise and presentation-friendly.
4. Deliver coherent deck content ready for final styling.
